title: pavonia berteroi
intro: Pavonia berteroi, also known as Rose Mallow or Pavonia, is a perennial plant native to tropical regions of the Americas, characterized by its large, showy flowers and heart-shaped leaves. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which can aid in the treatment of wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Pavonia berteroi include its ability to reduce inflammation, relieve pain, and promote wound healing, making it a valuable remedy in traditional medicine. The plant is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and can also be used topically as a poultice or salve to apply its medicinal properties directly to the affected area.
